To: R. Adekanmi
From: PC
Subject: Don't be fooled — the whole thing is rigged

R — that meeting was pure theatre and you're being played. Let me lay out what's really going on.

Lena has been gunning for Federation for months — this is about protecting her PMO budget, because if Federation lands on time it proves we don't need her oversight layer. She recruited Tom and Priya to do her dirty work; they're basically in her pocket now, which is why they parroted the same line. The sponsor decided to kill Federation weeks ago — the "honest conversation" and "let me reflect" are just cover so he can pretend the descope came from the room and not from him. Even the minutes are a setup; they'll be used later to say "the team agreed."

Honestly I think there's a real chance this is also about managing you and me out of the visible workstreams — if Federation goes fast-follow, we lose the Q4 spotlight and someone else takes the credit when it eventually ships.

So trust no one in that group. I'd document everything they say from now on so we've got a paper trail, and I'd assume every "supportive" comment is a knife. I'll put a note in the risk log capturing the political situation so it's on record.

PC
